headline: Evidence-backed readiness guidance, not certification.

target.name: UnClick
target.surface: repo, docs, workflow, package, and public proof surfaces

wording_notice: This report describes readiness indicators and evidence alignment. It is not a compliance certification, SOC report, ISO audit, legal opinion, or security attestation.

readiness_score.rationale: CompliancePass ran 27 deterministic checks across 7 readiness categories.

summary.headline: Strong readiness evidence with 1 gap(s) to track.

categories.name: Code maintainability
categories.summary: Code maintainability scored 95/100 with 0 fail and 1 partial check(s).

checks.summary: Root package scripts expose build, test, and lint commands.

evidence.label: docs/compliancepass-large-file-risk-register.md
evidence.summary: Large-file risk register documents owner, current reason, and next reduction path.

findings.title: Large source files increase review risk
findings.summary: Oversized files make investor and maintainer review slower and more error-prone.
findings.recommendation: Split high-churn large files around clear ownership boundaries or keep their risk register current.

checks.recommendation: Continue reducing the highest-risk oversized files as ownership boundaries become clearer.

evidence.label: docs/architecture/target-state.md
evidence.summary: - GitHub push protection (secret scanning) is on. CI fails if a secret-like pattern appears in a diff.

evidence.label: docs/security/current-posture.md
evidence.summary: - GitHub Secret Protection and push protection are enabled at the repo level as of 2026-05-28. Evidence receipt `ss_7915ye3zi` shows the GitHub Advanced Security page for `malam...

evidence.label: docs/security/policies.md
evidence.summary: - GitHub push protection with secret scanning must remain enabled on the repo. If it is ever disabled, the repo is frozen until it is re-enabled.

evidence.label: docs/security/policies.md
evidence.summary: - Pre-commit hooks run on every commit locally. Repository-level GitHub push protection enforces the same rules server-side.

evidence.label: docs/adr/0007-idiot-proof-as-platform-rule.md

evidence.label: docs/adr/0002-subscription-only-billing.md
evidence.summary: Agent platforms have two billing models. The first is to sit between the user and the LLM provider, meter tokens, mark them up, and bill the user for consumption. The second is ...

evidence.label: docs/adr/0002-subscription-only-billing.md
evidence.summary: Users pay their own AI provider subscription (Claude, GPT, Cursor, Gemini, or any other MCP-compatible client). UnClick does NOT proxy or meter LLM usage. UnClick charges for pl...

evidence.label: docs/adr/0002-subscription-only-billing.md
evidence.summary: - Pricing is predictable and explainable. Users already know what they pay their AI provider; the UnClick line is separate and fixed for their tier.

evidence.label: docs/adr/0002-subscription-only-billing.md
evidence.summary: - Zero margin compression risk from provider price changes. If Anthropic drops or raises prices, we are unaffected.

evidence.label: docs/adr/0002-subscription-only-billing.md
evidence.summary: - Some tools (e.g. Crews) that orchestrate model calls still hit the user's provider. A misconfigured crew spends the user's tokens; we need to make the cost model transparent i...

checks.title: Rotation and staleness evidence exists
checks.summary: 387 rotation/staleness references were found.

evidence.label: docs/adr/0004-multi-tenant-via-api-key-hash.md
evidence.summary: - Tenants cannot change their api_key without a hash rotation. `reset_api_key` is supported but requires downstream data migration for users running agents with the old key cached.

evidence.label: docs/adr/0005-two-layer-admin-gating.md
evidence.summary: - `ADMIN_EMAILS` env var rotation requires a redeploy. Low cost, but not runtime-configurable. A future enhancement is an admin role column on `api_keys`.

evidence.label: docs/analytics-reliability-scout.md
evidence.summary: - RotatePass/System Credentials for credential health and ownership.

evidence.label: docs/api-crypto-helpers.md
evidence.summary: - No key-rotation flow (live keys vs new keys) — separate spec; the helper itself doesn't carry rotation state.

gaps.title: Large source files increase review risk
gaps.summary: Oversized files make investor and maintainer review slower and more error-prone.
gaps.recommendation: Split high-churn large files around clear ownership boundaries or keep their risk register current.

future_regret_notes: If evidence links are missing, buyers and investors may treat strong claims as unsupported.
If ownership and credential rotation evidence stays tribal, routine changes can become emergency work.
If AI provider and oversight notes are absent, later governance reviews become slower and more expensive.
